name: Angular Dev
postCreateCommand: if ! command -v ng >/dev/null 2>&1; then npm install -g @angular/cli; fi && if [ -f package.json ]; then npm install; fi
postStartCommand: if [ -f angular.json ]; then echo 'Angular project detected. Start with: npm start or ng serve --host 0.0.0.0 --port 4200'; fi
